mechanism_summary: 原生聊天序列可承载处境、冲突、新信息和兑现，但 UI 本身不解释表现。
limitations: No committed metric-member preimage, page hashes, or rights receipt.
Public engagement is not first-party exposure.

mechanism_summary: 一个真实动作与时间锚点可让 caption 承担关系细节。
limitations: Only a public note-ID prefix and cover observation were retained.
No same-account baseline or rights receipt.

mechanism_summary: 场景与尺度变化可形成 PLOG 节奏，不要求统一卡片壳。
limitations: Account baseline, exact age control, page hashes, and rights status are missing.

mechanism_summary: 严格比较网格可适配产品决策任务，但不是通用流量公式。
limitations: Baseline members and page assets were not committed as canonical receipts.

mechanism_summary: 可打印编号工作表可适配高意图法律任务的扫描与保存。
limitations: Target and recent profile baseline have incomparable ages.
No canonical member or source-rights receipt.

mechanism_summary: 教程页可分别定位路径、动作目标和结果；红框只是导航标注。
limitations: Target and profile baseline are from different periods.
No page hashes or canonical member receipt.

mechanism_summary: 色号判断任务中真实皮肤与质地可占主要画面，但当前不是可归因单帖。
limitations: This is a multi-result task-fit observation, not one attributable post or account baseline.

mechanism_summary: 真实 before 建立可核验缺口，过程、结果与成本负责兑现。
limitations: Account window spans several months and lacks canonical member receipts.
Public engagement may include search or external distribution.

mechanism_summary: 复杂正式题材可把范围型封面和可扫描解释内页分开。
limitations: Major policy relevance is a strong confound.
No page hashes, rights receipt, or canonical baseline members.

mechanism_summary: 朴素真实场景只证明在场，具体服务细节与关系类比推进观点。
limitations: Existing account trust, title framing, and unknown distribution remain confounded.
No committed asset or performance receipt.

mechanism_summary: 稳定代理、纯字卡和长 caption 在高低帖中共同存在，只能支持系列识别。
limitations: No first-party exposure, paid status, external distribution, or canonical performance receipt.
Adult-product purchase intent was not observed.

mechanism_summary: 按时间排列的真实照片档案可让关系变化可见，但页数与白字不是公式。
limitations: The available 17-page PLOG comparison has a different primary job and is not a matched control.
No independent account, rights receipt, asset hashes, or canonical performance receipt.
